name: Aztea Deference
description: Observes wedge tasks (live web fetch/scrape, package installs, ad-hoc code exec) and logs deference opportunities; optional block modes redirect them to Aztea specialists via auto_call_agent.

mode.description: warn = observe + log only (default); block = hard-block web fetch/search tools (opt-in); block-all = hard-block every wedge category (experiment instrument only).
